summary: Full backend + frontend testing complete for 'Your Own Print' e-commerce app. 13/13 backend pytest tests pass (100%). All critical frontend flows work: 4-theme showcase, theme selection (API + localStorage + toast), Workwear/Teams products grids, Designer tool (add text/filter/size/qty/total updates correctly), Stripe checkout session creation returns 200 with url+session_id, Contact form submits and shows success toast.

issues: React dev warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> — caused by dev-time element instrumentation wrapping option labels in <select data-testid='designer-product'>. Does not affect functionality but pollutes console with hydration warning. Low priority.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) The <option> children in <select data-testid='designer-product'> contain dynamic instrumentation spans that produce a console hydration warning. Render plain text inside <option> to silence it.

(Code style) In /app/backend/server.py the module-level `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` is defined AFTER the route that references it (stripe_webhook). It works because routes execute at request-time, but it should be moved above the routes for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured (~360 lines) — under 700 line guideline.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from responses (insert-only, no find that returns docs to client).
Pydantic validation in place (ContactRequest uses EmailStr, CheckoutRequest validates quantity at route level).
All currency/prices come from the server-side PRODUCTS dict — frontend cannot tamper with prices. Good security practice.
STRIPE_API_KEY uses env var with empty-string fallback; emergentintegrations StripeCheckout properly initialised per-request.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js — no hardcoded URLs.
data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements (theme buttons, designer controls, contact form, product grids).
test_credentials: Not applicable — no auth flows in this app.
seed_data_creation: None required — products are seeded in-memory in server.py PRODUCTS dict. Test contact submissions and theme selections created with TEST_ prefix; can be cleaned via Mongo if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and cover: root, products list + category filters (workwear, teams-schools), single product 404, contact (valid/minimal/invalid-email), theme-selection, checkout (invalid product 400, invalid quantity 400, valid 200 + status fetch). All 13 pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend was verified via Playwright on https://branded-workwear-lab.preview.emergentagent.com — theme selection persists to localStorage and posts to /api/theme-selection; designer tool calculates total correctly (£6.99×3=£20.97); /api/checkout/session returns 200 with valid Stripe url; contact form returns {ok:true,id:...}. Only console noise is a React option-child-span hydration warning from dev instrumentation — not a real bug.
rca of the issue: No bugs identified that block the MVP. Console warning about <span> child of <option> originates from build-time element tagging (x-file-name/x-line-number attributes wrapped in <span> via dev tooling) and is benign in production builds.
